title: OAR benchmark domain pack
description: The 'meta.domain' profile for one OAR benchmark domain pack (OAR_BENCHMARK_DESIGN_WORKING.md Sec 2/4). Reuses the released card/evidence/exit-trigger/ledger-entry schemas verbatim (schemas/candidate_card.schema.json, schemas/evidence.schema.json, schemas/exit_trigger.schema.json, schemas/qpop_entry.schema.json) -- this schema covers only the NEW pack-level metadata a domain contributes; it never redefines those. v0 packs are aggregate-only (see aggregate_results.schema.json) -- no per-card content ships in a pack.

domain_label.description: Short human label for prompt example-asides (design doc Sec 2).

thesis_frame.description: The one-line framing the private SOURCE/EVALUATE prompts would specialize to. Carried here as documentation only -- v0 makes no prompt-construction or LLM calls.

finance_domain.description: true if this domain is a finance/markets substrate (design doc Sec 4's physical/non-physical x finance/non-finance grid).

ground_truth_provenance.description: constructed / adjudicated / settled are the three provenances defined in design doc Sec 2. 'recorded' is a v0-only, lower-rigor addition for a real historical funnel run that has not (yet) been through the blinded multi-auditor lane -- used honestly instead of over-claiming 'adjudicated' for a pack that never ran that protocol.

example_sets.description: Optional domain-specific fill-ins that thread through the (unmodified) private prompt constructors (design doc Sec 2). Documentation only in v0 -- no prompt constructor runs in this public package.

node_list_ref.description: Pointer to where this domain's chokepoint node list is documented. No filled-in bottleneck_map.yml ships publicly for either v0 pack -- the live map is private; examples/template_domain/bottleneck_map.template.yml is the public shape.

aggregate_results_ref.description: Filename of this pack's aggregate_results.json, relative to the pack directory.

source_docs.description: Repo-relative citations backing every number in this pack's aggregate_results.json -- no number here may lack a source_docs entry.

privacy_note.description: Restates the release boundary for this specific pack: aggregate-only, no live positions, no broker/paid data, no per-card content (design doc Sec 6 / DISCLAIMER.md / ETHICS.md).
